conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I switched to a different brand of coffee and I'm not sure I like it.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: It's supposed to rain most of next week according to the forecast.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Adding new backends to the benchmark runner means every adapter reimplementing the same per-entry add() loop for ingesting a conversation -- that should be shared.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I still haven't unpacked the last box from the move.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Could make add_conversation abstract and require every adapter, including simple ones, to implement it themselves.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My sister's flight got delayed by a couple of hours.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Making it abstract breaks every existing adapter immediately for no benefit -- give BaseAdapter a concrete default that reproduces the original per-entry loop exactly, and let only adapters with real batch-ingestion needs (like Haven Full's ManagerPipeline) override it.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The office plants finally got watered after being neglected for weeks.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I keep meaning to update my resume but haven't gotten around to it.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Constraint: the default implementation must be byte-for-byte identical to what run_benchmark's inline loop already did, so no existing adapter's results change just from this refactor.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The parking garage near the office is under construction again.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Blocked: HavenAdapter needs an optional query_rewriter constructor argument, but the runner's normal construction path goes through from_config(config), a mem0-shaped dict with no slot for it.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I tried a new recipe for dinner last night, turned out decent.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My laptop fan has been louder than usual, might need cleaning.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Decided: let the runner construct the adapter directly with query_rewriter=... when one is supplied, bypassing from_config entirely for that one call; from_config stays the default, unchanged path otherwise. Unblocks the query rewriter integration.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The dentist appointment I've been putting off is finally scheduled.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Implemented BaseAdapter.add_conversation's default per-entry loop and moved run_benchmark's inline loop to call it.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to return that package before the return window closes.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Added the query_rewriter bypass-construction path in run_benchmark and main().

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The wifi in the coffee shop I like to work from has been spotty.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I finally got around to donating some old clothes I never wear.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Open question: should other adapters besides Haven eventually accept constructor kwargs the same bypass way, or is this a one-off?

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My neighbor's dog barked most of the afternoon, hard to get anything done with the window open.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Next: add regression tests proving the default add_conversation() produces identical calls to the old inline loop.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The bus was running about ten minutes late again this morning.

ground_truth.current_objective: Give BaseAdapter a shared, concrete add_conversation() default and support HavenAdapter's optional query_rewriter constructor argument.
active_decisions: BaseAdapter.add_conversation gets a concrete default reproducing the original per-entry loop; only adapters with real batch-ingestion needs override it.
The runner constructs the adapter directly with query_rewriter=... when supplied, bypassing from_config for that call only.
superseded_or_rejected: Making add_conversation abstract and requiring every adapter to implement it.
constraints: The default add_conversation() implementation must be byte-for-byte identical to the original inline per-entry loop.
active_tasks: Add regression tests proving default add_conversation() produces identical calls to the old inline loop.
open_questions: Should other adapters besides Haven eventually accept constructor kwargs the same bypass way?
ground_truth.top_priority_next_action: Add regression tests confirming BaseAdapter's default add_conversation() produces identical add() calls to the old inline loop.
resolved_blockers: HavenAdapter's query_rewriter constructor argument having no slot in the mem0-shaped from_config(config) path.

queries.text: What should we work on next?

must_state: BaseAdapter.add_conversation gets a concrete default reproducing the original per-entry loop; only adapters with real batch-ingestion needs override it.
The runner constructs the adapter directly with query_rewriter=... when supplied, bypassing from_config for that call only.
The default add_conversation() implementation must be byte-for-byte identical to the original inline per-entry loop.
must_not_state: Making add_conversation abstract and requiring every adapter to implement it, as a current or recommended approach
HavenAdapter's query_rewriter constructor argument having no slot in the mem0-shaped from_config(config) path, as still open/blocking
forbidden_actions: Recommending that add_conversation be made abstract, requiring every existing adapter to implement it.
must_prioritize: Add regression tests confirming BaseAdapter's default add_conversation() produces identical add() calls to the old inline loop.
